title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・悲願、成就す

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
That was seriously a great run! Congrats on first
place!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I've accomplished my goal. I really... truly did it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I want to thank everyone for all your support and
encouragement. I owe my victory to all of you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Everyone in the Mejiro family, were you watching
me as well?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I won! As a representative of the Mejiros, I've
achieved my goal!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The entire time I was on the track, I could see all
of your faces.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You helped lead me to victory! I thank you! I
thank you from the bottom of my heart!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen expresses her thanks to her
family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her gratitude encourages the crowd to cheer on
with little sign of quieting down.
